title: Cheilanthes rawsonii
taxonomy: Cheilanthes rawsonii belongs to the family Pteridaceae, commonly known as the maidenhair fern family. This species is classified under the genus Cheilanthes, which includes various types of rock ferns. The classification further breaks down to the kingdom Plantae and the division Pteridophyta, signifying its status as a vascular plant with a non-vascular reproductive system. Cheilanthes rawsonii is a specific species within the Cheilanthes genus, characterized by its unique characteristics and adaptations. The classification of Cheilanthes rawsonii reflects its evolutionary relationships and distinct features within the plant kingdom.
